steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/
steps.observed: App loaded with Base chain selected, USDC/WETH prefilled

steps.action: Click settings gear icon
steps.observed: Settings panel opened showing Tokenlist Sources and Local Tokens sections

steps.action: Verify local tokens exist (DAI, SHIB on Ethereum)
steps.observed: DAI (0x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F) and SHIB (0x95aD61b0a150d79219dCF64E1E6Cc01f0B64C4cE) shown under Local Tokens

steps.action: Click Export button
steps.expected: JSON file downloaded in Uniswap tokenlist format
steps.observed: File 'local-tokens.json' downloaded. Message 'Exported 2 tokens' shown. File contains valid Uniswap tokenlist format with name, version, timestamp, and tokens array

evidence.network: File download triggered via Blob URL

steps.action: With empty local list (after clearing tokens), click Import button
steps.observed: File chooser dialog opened

steps.action: Select previously exported tokenlist JSON file
steps.expected: Tokens merged into local list with success message
steps.observed: Message 'Imported 2 new tokens' shown. DAI and SHIB restored with correct addresses and chain (Ethereum)

steps.action: Switch to Ethereum chain and search 'DAI' in autocomplete
steps.observed: DAI (0x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F) appeared in autocomplete dropdown

evidence.network: No network requests for import (local file read)

steps.action: Click Import and select a non-JSON file (ct_g3_invalid_not_json.txt)
steps.expected: Error message shown, existing tokens unaffected
steps.observed: Error message 'Import error: File is not valid JSON' shown in red. DAI and SHIB tokens remain in local list

steps.action: Click Import and select a JSON file without tokens array (ct_g3_malformed_json.json)
steps.expected: Error message about missing tokens array, existing tokens unaffected
steps.observed: Error message 'Import error: File must contain a tokens array' shown in red. DAI and SHIB tokens remain in local list

assertions.title: Round-trip export then import preserves tokens

steps.action: Verify tokens exist: DAI and SHIB on Ethereum in settings panel
steps.observed: DAI (0x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F) and SHIB (0x95aD61b0a150d79219dCF64E1E6Cc01f0B64C4cE) shown

steps.action: Click Export to download tokenlist JSON
steps.observed: local-tokens.json downloaded with 2 tokens in Uniswap format

steps.action: Remove DAI token via remove button
steps.observed: DAI removed, only SHIB remains

steps.action: Remove SHIB token via remove button
steps.observed: SHIB removed. 'No custom tokens saved' message shown. Export button disabled

steps.action: Click Import and select the exported file
steps.expected: Both tokens restored with identical metadata
steps.observed: 'Imported 2 new tokens' message. DAI and SHIB restored with same addresses and chain (Ethereum)

steps.action: Search 'DAI' in autocomplete (Ethereum chain)
steps.observed: DAI Stablecoin (0x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F) appears in autocomplete

evidence.network: No network requests for local import/export

assertions.title: Export with empty local list handled

steps.action: Remove all local tokens (DAI and SHIB)
steps.observed: 'No custom tokens saved' placeholder message shown

steps.action: Check Export button state
steps.expected: Export button disabled with visual indicator
steps.observed: Export button is disabled (grayed out, not clickable). No error or empty file download occurs

steps.action: Open settings panel with local tokens (DAI, SHIB on Ethereum)
steps.observed: DAI and SHIB shown in Local Tokens section with full addresses and Ethereum chain label

steps.action: Export local tokens to JSON file
steps.observed: local-tokens.json downloaded with 2 tokens, 'Exported 2 tokens' message shown

steps.action: Remove all local tokens via remove buttons
steps.observed: Both tokens removed. 'No custom tokens saved' shown. Export button disabled

steps.action: Import the previously exported file
steps.observed: 'Imported 2 new tokens' message. DAI and SHIB restored with identical metadata (same addresses, chain)

steps.action: Switch to Ethereum and verify tokens appear in autocomplete
steps.observed: DAI (0x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F) appeared in From Token autocomplete dropdown

evidence.network: No network requests for local import/export

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. Export produces valid Uniswap tokenlist JSON (VAL-IO-001). Import merges tokens from valid JSON files (VAL-IO-002). Invalid files (non-JSON, JSON without tokens array) show descriptive error messages without affecting existing tokens (VAL-IO-003). Round-trip export→clear→import preserves all token metadata (VAL-IO-004, VAL-CROSS-006). Export button is disabled when no local tokens exist (VAL-IO-005).
